reports.text:
Community 2 in IIT Jammu Physics Department:
  Faculty: Arpita Paul
  ResearchArea: My research work focuses on first-principles quantum theory of advanced functional materials. It not only aims at achieving microscopic insights into exotic states of fundamentally interesting materials (frustrated magnets, multiferroics, superconductors, Hund’s metals and topological superconductors), but also designing materials of technological importance (multiferroics, superconductors and transparent conductors)
  Relationships: RESEARCHES_IN: 6

Summary: This group includes 1 faculty member(s): physics:Arpita Paul. working in areas like physics:My research work focuses on first-principles quantum theory of advanced functional materials.
